## Summary

Describe the main change in 2-5 bullets.

## Linked issues

- Closes #
- Related #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs / process only

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the relevant script(s) locally.
- [ ] I checked logs/metrics and attached key results below.
- [ ] I verified no data leakage (patient-level split preserved).

## Key metrics / evidence

Add relevant numbers (Dice, HD95, P/R/F1, bbox IoU) and note dataset split.

## Risks and rollback

State possible risks and how to revert quickly if needed.
